lighting.shadow_character: Deep, dark shadows with sharp edges, creating high contrast
lighting.highlight_shadow_ratio: Very high contrast, with some highlights near clipping

color.grading_style: Split Toning with lifted blacks (purple/blue tint) and warm highlights

composition.focus_point: Cross-section of the orange slices in the center of the plate
composition.composition_rule: Subtle Rule of Thirds with diagonal lines from the tablecloth pattern

texture.detail_rendering: Excellent rendering of the orange's moist pulp and bumpy peel texture due to hard light

improvement_notes: To achieve a more professional commercial look, soften the light with a large diffuser and use a reflector to fill in shadows. Reduce the saturation of the background tablecloth to draw more attention to the oranges. Use a simpler background (e.g., linen, wood) and create more negative space for a more refined composition.
nano_banana_prompt: close-up top-down angle food photography of [sushi platter on a rustic plate], harsh direct sunlight from the side creating strong specular highlights and deep, defined shadows, high contrast, vibrant and saturated colors, bohemian style, on a busy floral patterned tablecloth, dominant colors are deep blue and magenta, Kodak Ektar 100 film aesthetic, noticeable film grain, sharp details on the food texture --ar 4:5
